# Argus default keyword vocabulary - hand-curated for CLIP photo tagging.
#
# Curated, not auto-generated: every entry is a distinct, common, visually-groundable
# concept. Open Images (~20k) was abandoned as a source because its long tail of
# obscure/near-synonym terms (e.g. "Lotus family", "Chess boxing", 11 variants of
# "game") scores in the same band as real concepts and buries them - no frequency /
# concreteness / dedup filter can separate them. A smaller clean list gives CLIP far
# better results (proven on real photos). Edit freely; duplicates are removed on load.
#
# Lines starting with # are comments. One concept per line.

# --- People: age / sex ---
person
people
man
woman
boy
girl
child
children
baby
toddler
teenager
young adult
adult
middle-aged man
middle-aged woman
elderly man
elderly woman
elderly person
senior citizen

# --- People: groups (no kinship terms - CLIP can't see relationships, so "son",
#     "mother", "brother" etc. would just fire on any matching age/sex) ---
family
couple
friends
group of people
crowd
team
group photo
gathering
reunion

# --- People: roles ---
bride
groom
graduate
athlete
musician
dancer
chef
doctor
nurse
police officer
firefighter
soldier
construction worker
farmer
teacher
student
artist
photographer
tourist
vendor

# --- Expressions / mood ---
smiling
laughing
serious face
surprised
crying
sleeping
candid moment
posing
portrait
selfie

holding a baby
blowing out candles

# --- Photo style / composition (visually determinable; subjective mood words like
#     "cozy"/"romantic"/"peaceful" are intentionally excluded - CLIP can't see mood,
#     it would just guess, same problem as kinship terms) ---
close-up
portrait photo
landscape photo
black and white
aerial view
silhouette
reflection
panorama
night photography
